positive: A majestic, stylized mythical griffin perched on a swirling, abstract nebula cloud, rendered in a clean, thick line art style combined with vibrant, cosmic watercolor washes. The griffin has powerful, elegant silhouettes and is composed of geometric, feather-like elements. The background is deep indigo and ethereal gold, contrasting sharply with the white-outlined subject. Central composition, hyper-detailed, vector illustration quality, perfect for a T-shirt graphic, dramatic spotlighting, high contrast.
